messages.content: 扮演一位Health Psychology期刊（ISSN：0278-6133）的资深编辑，对以下将要发表在Health Psychology期刊（ISSN：0278-6133）上的论文内容进行翻译，修改和润色“1）激光组实验流程：被试在餐后2小时之后接受实验；实验开始前测量各形态指标；用清洁膏清洁被试腹部皮肤，将激光电极绑在腹部两侧及腋下和腹股沟淋巴管处，进行20分钟的激光照射；照射结束后用声波按摩仪由腹部中心位置朝向两侧腹股沟位置5分钟；接着对带脉进行5分钟的按摩，对带脉上的带脉、大横、天枢、中脘等穴位着重按压。每次试验后再次测量各形态指标；干预后的下一顿正餐以150g左右的苹果+200ml的酸奶作为代餐。”

1）Experimental Procedure in the Laser Group: Participants underwent the experiment two hours after their meal. Baseline measurements of various physiological parameters were taken prior to the experiment. The subject's abdominal skin was cleaned with a cleansing lotion, and laser electrodes were attached to the sides of the abdomen, as well as the armpits and inguinal lymph nodes. The participants received 20 minutes of laser irradiation. Following the irradiation, a sonic massager was used to massage the abdominal area from the center towards the inguinal lymph nodes for 5 minutes. Subsequently, a 5-minute massage was performed on the meridian, with a focus on pressing acupuncture points such as Zusanli, Daheng, Tianchu, and Zhongwan on the meridian. Measurements of various physiological parameters were taken again after each session. For the next regular meal after the intervention, participants were provided with a meal replacement consisting of approximately 150g of apples and 200ml of yogurt.

扮演一位HEALTH PSYCHOLy期刊（ISSN：0278-6133）的资深编辑，对以下将要发表在HEALTH PSYCHOL期刊（ISSN：0278-6133）的论文内容进行修改和润色：“2) CG procedure: One hour after a meal, the various morphological indicators were measured for the participants in the skipping rope group. Rope skipping exercise was performed continuously for 30 minutes at a frequency of 80-120 jumps per minute. Following a 10-minute rest period after rope skipping, the morphological indicators were measured once again.
3) Both the laser group and the skipping rope group underwent two experiments per week, totaling six experiments over a three-week period. A minimum of two days was provided between each experiment to ensure adequate recovery and prevent potential carryover effects. 
”

2) CG Procedure: The participants in the skipping rope group had their various morphological indicators measured one hour after a meal. They engaged in continuous rope skipping exercise for 30 minutes, maintaining a frequency of 80-120 jumps per minute. After a 10-minute rest period following rope skipping, the morphological indicators were measured again.

3) Both the laser group and the skipping rope group completed a total of six experiments over a three-week period, with two experiments conducted each week. A minimum of two days was allocated between each experiment to allow for sufficient recovery and to minimize any potential carryover effects.

扮演一位HEALTH PSYCHOLy期刊（ISSN：0278-6133）的资深编辑，对以下将要发表在HEALTH PSYCHOL期刊（ISSN：0278-6133）的论文内容进行翻译和润色：“2）跳绳组实验流程：餐后1小时运动前，测量各形态指标；以80-120个/分钟的频率，连续跳绳30分钟；跳绳结束10min后，再次测量各形态指标。
3）激光组和跳绳组每周进行2次实验，持续三周共6次实验。2次实验之间至少间隔2天。”

2）Experimental Procedure in the Skipping Rope Group: One hour after a meal, baseline measurements of various morphological indicators were taken before the exercise. Participants engaged in continuous rope skipping exercise for 30 minutes, maintaining a frequency of 80-120 jumps per minute. After a 10-minute rest period following the rope skipping, the morphological indicators were measured again.

3）Both the laser group and the skipping rope group underwent two experiments per week, totaling six experiments over a three-week period. A minimum interval of two days was provided between each experiment to ensure adequate recovery and minimize any potential carryover effects.

扮演一位HEALTH PSYCHOLy期刊（ISSN：0278-6133）的资深编辑，对以下将要发表在HEALTH PSYCHOL期刊（ISSN：0278-6133）的论文内容进行翻译，修改和润色：“评价指标
Measurements were taken before and after treatment. The patient took a standing position. AC was measured around the umbilicus. ASF was measured at a point 3 cm to the right of the midpoint of the umbilicus and 3 cm vertically downward. BF% and BW were also measured.
统计学分析
Paired t-tests were used for each indicator, and all data were presented as means ± standard deviation (x±s). When comparing the change in skinfold thickness in different groups, the relative percentage change in skinfold thickness was calculated based on the initial value. Statistical analysis was conducted using SPSS 23.0 software.”

Evaluation Measures:
Measurements were taken before and after the treatment intervention. Participants assumed a standing position during the measurements. Abdominal circumference (AC) was measured around the umbilicus. Abdominal skinfold thickness (ASF) was measured 3 cm to the right of the midpoint of the umbilicus and vertically downward by 3 cm. Body fat percentage (BF%) and body weight (BW) were also measured.

Statistical Analysis:
Paired t-tests were conducted for each indicator, and the data were presented as means ± standard deviation (mean ± SD). The change in skinfold thickness between different groups was compared by calculating the relative percentage change based on the initial value. Statistical analysis was performed using SPSS 23.0 software.

扮演一位HEALTH PSYCHOLy期刊（ISSN：0278-6133）的资深编辑，对以下将要发表在HEALTH PSYCHOL期刊（ISSN：0278-6133）的论文内容进行翻译，修改和润色：“1.4  测量指标
测量受试者每次实验前后的腹围（过肚脐眼处周长）、腹部皮脂褶皱厚度（以肚脐眼中点水平往右3 cm，再垂直往下3 cm处）、体脂百分数、体重，以作分析。
1.5  统计学分析
对各指标采用配对t检验，所有数据均以均数±标准差(x±s)表示。在比较不同组别皮脂褶皱厚度的变化程度时，以初始皮脂褶皱厚度值为基准，计算皮脂褶皱厚度变化的相对数百分数。据统计用SPSS 23.0软件分析完成。”

1.4 Measurement Indicators:
The participants' abdominal circumference (measured at the level of the umbilicus), abdominal skinfold thickness (measured 3 cm to the right of and vertically below the midpoint of the umbilicus), body fat percentage, and body weight were measured before and after each experiment to facilitate analysis.

1.5 Statistical Analysis:
Paired t-tests were employed to analyze the aforementioned indicators, with all data presented as mean ± standard deviation (mean ± SD). When comparing the change in skinfold thickness between different groups, the relative percentage change in skinfold thickness was calculated based on the initial value. The statistical analysis was conducted using SPSS 23.0 software.

扮演一位HEALTH PSYCHOLy期刊（ISSN：0278-6133）的资深编辑，对以下将要发表在HEALTH PSYCHOL期刊（ISSN：0278-6133）的论文内容进行翻译，修改和润色：“1.4  测量指标
AＣ 、AST测定时受试者直立，双足分开与肩同宽，体质量均匀分布在两腿上，于自然呼气终期测量。AC测量的是过肚脐眼处周长，AST测量位置为肚脐眼正中点水平往右3 cm，再垂直往下3 cm处，BF%、BW则用INBODY3.0体成分测试仪测试。AＣ 、AST每次测量３次，取其平均值。”

1.4 Measurement Indicators:
For the measurement of AC and AST, participants stood upright with their feet shoulder-width apart and their body weight evenly distributed on both legs. The measurements were taken at the end of a natural exhalation. AC measured the circumference around the level of the umbilicus, while AST was measured at a point 3 cm to the right of the midpoint of the umbilicus and vertically downward by 3 cm. BF% and BW were assessed using the INBODY 3.0 body composition analyzer. AC and AST measurements were conducted three times, and the average value was taken for analysis.

扮演一位HEALTH PSYCHOLy期刊（ISSN：0278-6133）的资深编辑，对以下将要发表在HEALTH PSYCHOL期刊（ISSN：0278-6133）的学术论文的部分内容进行修改和润色：“Results
The paired t-test results showed that after 6 interventions over a period of 3 weeks, EG exhibited significant decreases in AC, AST, BF%, and BW, with reductions of 5.04 cm, 8.14 mm, 0.94%, and 0.66 kg, respectively. CG only exhibited a decrease in AST of 1.98 mm, while AC, BF%, and BW did not show significant changes (Table 1). Paired t-tests were conducted on AC, AST, BF%, BW for EG, and AST for CG between the values before and after each intervention. The results showed that there were no significant differences in BF% and BW for EG before and after each intervention (P>0.05). However, AC and AST for EG exhibited significant changes after each intervention, with reductions of 1.56 cm, 1.36 cm, 1.13 cm, 1.12 cm, 0.71 cm, 1.30 cm, and 2.68 mm, 1.9 mm, 1.84 mm, 1.34 mm, 1.28 mm, 1.72 mm, respectively (Figure 1, Figure 2). AST for CG showed changes after interventions 1, 2, 4, 5, and 6, with reductions of 0.88 mm, 0.48 mm, 0.59 mm, 0.46 mm, and 0.52 mm, except for intervention 3 (Figure 3). Paired t-tests were then conducted between the values of AC and AST for EG, and AST for CG after each intervention and the values before the next intervention. The results showed that AC for EG exhibited a significant increase after the third and fifth interventions, both increasing by 0.59 cm (Figure 1).Furthermore, to compare the changes in AST between the two groups after intervention, paired t-tests were conducted on the percentage change in AST. The results showed that EG exhibited a significant decrease of 21.36% compared to the initial value, while CG exhibited a decrease of 6.16%, with a significant difference (Figure 4).”

Results:
The paired t-test results demonstrated that after 6 interventions over a 3-week period, the Experimental Group (EG) experienced significant reductions in AC, AST, BF%, and BW, with decreases of 5.04 cm, 8.14 mm, 0.94%, and 0.66 kg, respectively. In contrast, the Control Group (CG) only showed a decrease in AST of 1.98 mm, while AC, BF%, and BW did not exhibit significant changes (see Table 1). Paired t-tests were performed on AC, AST, BF%, BW for EG, and AST for CG, comparing the values before and after each intervention. The results indicated that there were no significant differences in BF% and BW for EG before and after each intervention (P > 0.05). However, AC and AST for EG showed significant changes after each intervention, with reductions of 1.56 cm, 1.36 cm, 1.13 cm, 1.12 cm, 0.71 cm, 1.30 cm, and 2.68 mm, 1.9 mm, 1.84 mm, 1.34 mm, 1.28 mm, 1.72 mm, respectively (refer to Figure 1, Figure 2). AST for CG exhibited changes after interventions 1, 2, 4, 5, and 6, with reductions of 0.88 mm, 0.48 mm, 0.59 mm, 0.46 mm, and 0.52 mm, except for intervention 3 (see Figure 3). Additionally, paired t-tests were conducted between the values of AC and AST for EG, and AST for CG after each intervention and before the subsequent intervention. The results indicated that AC for EG exhibited a significant increase after the third and fifth interventions, both increasing by 0.59 cm (refer to Figure 1). Furthermore, to compare the changes in AST between the two groups after intervention, paired t-tests were performed on the percentage change in AST. The results demonstrated that EG exhibited a significant decrease of 21.36% compared to the initial value, while CG showed a decrease of 6.16%, with a significant difference (see Figure 4).
扮演一位HEALTH PSYCHOLy期刊（ISSN：0278-6133）的资深编辑，对以下将要发表在HEALTH PSYCHOL期刊（ISSN：0278-6133）的学术论文的题目进行修改和润色：“弱激光干技术能够成为腹部减脂的常规医疗手段吗？一项对于新的LLLT对于腹部皮下脂肪短期疗效的研究”
"Can Low-Level Laser Therapy Become a Conventional Medical Approach for Abdominal Fat Reduction? A Study on the Short-Term Efficacy of Novel LLLT on Subcutaneous Abdominal Fat"
扮演一位HEALTH PSYCHOLy期刊（ISSN：0278-6133）的资深编辑，对以下将要发表在HEALTH PSYCHOL期刊（ISSN：0278-6133）的学术论文题目进行修改和润色：“弱激光干技术能够成为腹部减脂的常规医疗手段吗？一项改良的弱激光治疗对于腹部皮下脂肪减脂的短期疗效研究”

"Can Low-Level Laser Therapy Become a Conventional Medical Approach for Abdominal Fat Reduction? A Study on the Short-Term Efficacy of an Improved LLLT Treatment for Subcutaneous Abdominal Fat Reduction"
